title: AI-powered customer experiences
description: SAP's Advanced Success Plan embeds AI adoption patterns directly into delivery approaches, prioritizing high-impact use cases and guiding model governance.
evidence: The results are prioritized engagement with measurable outcomes like improved loyalty.

title: Unified customer experience orchestration across channels
description: SAP Engagement Cloud enables brands to activate journeys triggered by real-time events, breaking down silos and enabling enterprise-scale execution.
evidence: Customers can expect effortless experiences with personalized interactions.

title: Supply chain transformation towards autonomy
description: SAP Sapphire announced innovations like SAP Cloud ERP Private to accelerate the Autonomous Enterprise strategy, integrating AI directly into manufacturing processes.
evidence: Building on a foundation of integrated tools and planning capabilities.

title: Enhanced field services with integration across operational domains
description: A new SAP Field Service solution integrates service operations closely, linking parts usage to work execution for real-time alignment.
evidence: The approach aims at achieving measurable value quickly by integrating planning and finance systems.

title: Continuous improvement with integrated software updates
description: SAP provides continuous guidance, support integration adjustments based on feedback for better performance in production environments.
evidence: Functional experts are available to help address issues that arise during the implementation phase.
